#######.....

########....
########....
##########..
##########..
##########..
#########...
...####.....
............
............
............

for i in range(12):
    for j in range(12):
        if f(i, j) > 0:  # check if cell should be '#' or '.'
            print('#', end='')
        else:
            print('.', end='')
        print()  # move to next row
